title: Introduction to OSA webinar
subtitle: The objective of this event was to spread awareness among students about optics and related technologies and the functioning of OSA.
description: Title of the event : Introduction to OSA webinarObjective: The objective of this event was to spread awareness among students about optics and related technologies and the functioning of OSA. The programme sought to enlighten students on our campus with Optica. They were told that it is a professional society of individuals and companies with an interest in optics and photonics. It publishes journals and organizes conferences and exhibitions. It currently has about 488,000 customers in 183 count
